text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While I'm taking a break in the<n>cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're just the person I wanted<n>to see!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Matikanefukukitaru runs over to me<n>in a flurry.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Got anything weighing on<n>your mind?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aww, c'mon! Don't be like that! I<n>don't care
how trivial it is! I'm all<n>ears!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I received a divine message from the<n>great
Shiraoki telling me to be kind to<n>others.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And divine messages are final! Soplease help me to fulfill it!
choice_data_list: I guess I have a few favors to I'd like to ask...
Why don't you try being kind to yourself?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You got it! Just relax here while I get<n>you
everything you need!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru brings me drinks<n>and food in
quick succession.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'll massage your shoulders.<n>Let's see, I
also need to clean your<n>room after this, and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you require any more assistance,<n>please do
not hesitate to summon me,<n>Master!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you require any more assistance,<n>please do
not hesitate to summon me,<n>Master!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh, when did I develop these<n>maid-like
mannerisms?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This must be another blessing from<n>the great
Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I never thought to interpret it<n>that way. I
still don't know what to do<n>though...
choice_data_list: You can start by treating yourself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Treating myself for all the hard<n>work I've
done... I guess a small<n>break wouldn't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Are you sure this is the right thing to<n>do?
Shouldn't I be training or<n>something?
choice_data_list: Have faith in your divine message.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know what? You're totally right!<n>A divine
message from the great<n>Shiraoki could never be
wrong!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um, would you like to join me on my<n>little break?
Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I take the time to happily sip on some<n>tea with
Matikanefukukitaru.
